case_title: MAIDA WONG VS. HARMEET K. DHILLON

DEFENDANT HOWARD CHUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARTIN HEALY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, MAIDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DHILLON, HARMEET K. CHUNG, HOWARD N. HEALY, MARTIN J. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $0 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
